creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
@aqayadubai in Dubai Creek Harbour must be in your cafes-to-try list!

It is a “bakefectionary” serving the most creative desserts and dishes from around the world! 

What we had: 
💛 Tropical Ambiguity (50 AED) which looks like an egg on toast but in fact a mango-coconut French toast
🍔 Hot Honey Chicken Sandwich (51 AED): crispy chicken drizzled with sweet-spicy sauce
🦐 Shrimp-onara (60 AED): creamy carbonara overlorded with shrimp and bacon
❓The Mystery Cube which I’ll leave for you to find out. 

Plus points for friendly service and awesome views! 😍

Tag your foodie buddies!
